t-1.notes: feature: ship recovery · runDrossRecovery @ internal/cmd/ship_recover.go · delta-gated reset+restore+commit shared by ship recover and complete --recover; no-op when in sync

t-2.notes: feature: stale-state detection · staleCompletedState @ internal/cmd/status.go · warns on shipped-but-unmerged phase branch where local state reads completed but origin/main lacks it

t-3.notes: feature: stale-state detection · resume.md stale-completion drift case · teaches resume to reconcile a shipped-but-unmerged phase branch, never auto-mutate

t-4.notes: feature: ship recovery · ship.md ## Recovery cookbook · three mid-merge failure states each mapped to a one-command dross fix, no manual .dross/ surgery

t-5.notes: feature: ship recovery · phase complete --recover @ internal/cmd/phase.go · heals a diverged main in-loop via shared runDrossRecovery; refuses with a pointer when the flag is absent
